channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy
item.description: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

item.title: The Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates
item.description: Friday's jobs report provided evidence that the central bank's larger concern is a cost of living that is getting increasingly hard to bear.

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
item.description: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.

item.title: Rocket Lab surges 30% to fresh highs on revenue beat, record-setting launch deal
item.description: Enthusiasm for space stocks has skyrocketed ahead of SpaceX's anticipated IPO.

item.title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
item.description: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."

item.title: Investors are snapping up muni funds at fastest pace in 5 years. Why the good times may last
item.description: These experts are finding opportunities to grab solid income in the muni market.

item.title: Micron surges more than 30% on week as memory chip rally goes parabolic
item.description: Micron Technology shares caught fire this week amid a global shortage of memory chips. The stock is heading for its best week since 2008.

item.title: Virginia Supreme Court strikes down redistricting push in blow to Democrats
item.description: In the ongoing redistricting wars, Virginia was seen as an opportunity for Democrats to pick up as many as four U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterm elections.

item.title: U.S. says it struck two Iran-flagged oil tankers trying to skirt blockade
item.description: The shaky U.S. ceasefire with Iran has been repeatedly undermined this week, even as President Donald Trump insists it remains in effect.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Akamai, Fluence, Cloudflare, Micron Technology, Upwork & more
item.description: Here are some of the stocks making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Trump's $1 million 'Gold Card' fails to catch on among the world's wealthy
item.description: President Donald Trump's "Gold Card," which promised U.S. residency in "record time," has been dogged by delays and legal questions.

item.title: ‘Not a Chance Hormuz Opens’: How Wall Street’s new NACHO trade bets on a prolonged oil shock
item.description: Traders are embracing the “NACHO” trade, betting Hormuz disruptions and elevated oil prices will persist longer than expected.

item.title: AWS data center outage hits trading on FanDuel, Coinbase — recovery to take hours
item.description: The cloud platform says it is currently working to resolve the outage, caused by overheating at a data center in Northern Virginia.

item.title: Marco Rubio says U.S. expects Iran response on peace deal 'today'
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Friday that the U.S. is expecting a response from Iran on Washington's proposal to end the war.

item.title: Applied Materials is among the stocks reporting next week with earnings momentum
item.description: Other stocks with earnings momentum at their back include Constellation Energy and Ross Stores.

item.title: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher’ tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
item.description: President Donald Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S.

item.title: Stock pullbacks can be an opportunity to make your money back and then some. Here's how
item.description: Following its Q1 2026 earnings release, Fluor is pulling back by 15%.

item.title: The hottest ETF since bitcoin-mania just added $1 billion in a day
item.description: Roundhill Investment's Memory ETF (DRAM) tracking the red-hot memory sector has raised more than $5 billion since its April 2 launch.

item.title: Fitness wearable Whoop to offer on-demand clinician access to U.S. users
item.description: Whoop is introducing on-demand clinician access and AI-powered health guidance, largely included in the price of membership.

item.title: What an Apple deal to buy Intel chips would mean for the iPhone maker
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Toyota fourth-quarter profit misses by wide margin as U.S. tariffs drive 49% slump
item.description: The world's largest automaker by sales volume saw a 1.89% year-on-year rise in revenue during the fourth quarter ended March.

item.title: VantageScore 4.0 can now be used to determine your mortgage rate. Here's how to find yours.
item.description: This credit score model will help those with a thin credit history, medical debt or a prior settled collections access a mortgage.

item.title: U.S. opens probe into startup Avride self-driving crashes in Texas
item.description: NHTSA said the vehicles had executed lane changes into other vehicles and failed to avoid vehicles or objects in the road, resulting in crashes.

item.title: Nintendo hikes Switch 2 prices and expects console sales to decline as memory crunch bites
item.description: Nintendo said the price of the Switch 2 in the U.S. will rise from $449.99 to $499.99. In Japan, Nintendo will hike the price from 49,980 yen to 59,980 yen.

item.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
item.description: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

item.title: Cost of living crunch hurts UK PM Starmer in local elections
item.description: Early local election results in the U.K. indicate a backlash against the government, as cost of living pressures have once again dominated political discourse.

item.title: French prosecutors escalate probe of Elon Musk and X to criminal investigation
item.description: France is investigating whether Elon Musk and his social media app X were complicit in spreading harmful AI deepfakes.

item.title: The rise of 'income stacking': Why Gen Z is juggling multiple jobs
item.description: The percentage of the workforce holding multiple jobs has been rising since 2020, reaching an all-time high last fall. “Income stacking” is popular with Gen Z.

item.title: Jim Cramer says this struggling stock could remain under pressure in AI-driven market
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: Akamai stock soars 20% on earnings, $1.8 billion AI infrastructure deal
item.description: Cybersecurity and cloud computing firm Akamai reported first-quarter earnings on Thursday and saw its cloud infrastructure business grow 40% year-on-year.
